'''''Star Wars: Empire: Princess... Warrior''''' was a 2-issue story arc of ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. It ran from [[February 5]], [[2003]] to [[March 5]], 2003. The story takes place 3 weeks before [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope]].

The events in this story arc expand upon events first mentioned in the [[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'' radio drama]].
